metadata.description: Shut up and ship. Agent orchestration plugin for Claude Code — 7 agents, 11 skills, config-driven workflows, memory that survives sessions, and parallel sprint execution.

plugins.name: shut-up-and-ship
plugins.description: Shut up and ship. 7 agents (builder, tester, reviewer, planner, designer, debugger, migrator), 11 skills (router, init, scan, sprint, plan, design, hotfix, status, doctor, pr, memory), config-driven quality gates, feedback loops, memory system, and run observability.
